---
title: "Documentation: Write project README"
labels: documentation, readme, capstone, required
---

**Final deliverable — Documentation.**

As a developer, I want to write a clear README so that others can understand my project, features, setup, and interesting code.

### Tasks
- [ ] Add project overview.
- [ ] Add technologies used.
- [ ] Add setup instructions.
- [ ] Add API endpoint summary.
- [ ] Add screenshots of the application.
- [ ] Add interesting code section with explanation.
- [ ] Proofread formatting.
- [ ] Verify it displays clearly on GitHub.

### Done when
- README describes the project
- README includes setup instructions
- README lists completed features
- README includes screenshots
- README explains one interesting piece of code
- README includes technologies used
